nasb.text: They were continually devoting themselves to the apostles’ teaching and to fellowship, to the breaking of bread and to prayer.

esv.text: And they devoted themselves to the apostles’ teaching and the fellowship, to the breaking of bread and the prayers.

cnv.text: 他們恆心遵守使徒的教訓，彼此相通、擘餅和祈禱。

ccb.text: 他们都一心遵守使徒的教导，一起团契、掰饼、祷告。

csbs.text: 他们在使徒们的教导上，在契合、掰饼、祷告之事上恒切专心。
